steps: Go to https://vercel.com and log in or create a free account
Click your avatar in the top-right corner and select 'Account Settings'
Enter a descriptive name (e.g. 'Agent Gateway'), choose a scope (Full Account or a specific team), and set an expiration
Click 'Create Token' and copy the token immediately — it will not be shown again

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: Your Vercel personal access token (used as Bearer token in Authorization header)

notes: Free tier available with generous limits for personal projects
Token is shown only once at creation — store it immediately
Tokens can be scoped to a specific team or the full account
Use the Authorization: Bearer <token> header for all API calls

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile to verify the token
